name: Local Team Wins!
description: The Mallville Mallrats just won the big game and everyone needs a commemorative foam finger immediately.
notification_text: Local Team Wins! Sports memorabilia demand is surging for the next %d days!
resolution_text: The victory buzz has faded. Sports demand is returning to normal.
toast_message: The Mallville Mallrats won! Sports memorabilia is flying off the shelves!

name: Influencer Mention
description: A popular FlipFlop influencer filmed an unboxing video in the mall parking lot. Now everyone wants what they saw.
notification_text: Influencer Mention! A viral video is driving massive demand for %s for the next %d days!
resolution_text: The influencer has moved on to their next obsession. Demand is normalizing.
toast_message: A FlipFlop influencer just featured one of your items! Demand is spiking!

name: Supply Chain Snarl
description: A cargo ship got stuck in a canal somewhere. Again. Supplier deliveries are delayed across the board.
notification_text: Supply Chain Snarl! %s shipments are delayed for the next %d days.
resolution_text: The supply chain is flowing again. Supplier catalogs are fully stocked.
toast_message: Supply chain disruption! A product category is temporarily unavailable.

name: Five-Finger Discount
description: A sketchy individual in an oversized trench coat is lingering suspiciously near the display case.
notification_text: Shoplifting! Someone just pocketed %s from your shelves!
toast_message: A shoplifter was spotted in your store! Check your inventory.

name: Burst Pipe Surprise
description: The mall's ancient plumbing has struck again. A fixture is getting an unscheduled bath.
notification_text: Burst Pipe! A water leak has disabled a fixture for the next %d days.
resolution_text: The plumber finally showed up. All fixtures are back in service.
toast_message: A burst pipe has knocked out one of your fixtures!

name: D-List Celebrity Sighting
description: Someone who was on a reality show three seasons ago is signing autographs at the food court. Crowds are forming anyway.
notification_text: Celebrity Sighting! A minor celebrity is drawing crowds. Expect 3x foot traffic today!
resolution_text: The celebrity left via the service entrance. Traffic is calming down.
toast_message: A D-list celebrity is at the food court! Crowds are flooding the mall!

name: Rolling Blackout
description: The mall's electrical system is having one of its episodes. Lights are flickering and customers are spooked.
notification_text: Rolling Blackout! Power issues are scaring off customers. Expect half the usual traffic today.
resolution_text: The electrician found the problem — a squirrel. Power is restored.
toast_message: Power issues! Customer traffic is reduced today.

name: Convention Overflow
description: A convention at the civic center overflowed and collectors are spilling into the mall looking for deals.
notification_text: Convention Overflow! Collectors are flooding the mall for the next %d days!
resolution_text: The convention crowd has dispersed. The mall returns to its usual pace.
toast_message: Collectors from a nearby convention are swarming the mall!

name: Corporate Bulk Buy
description: A corporate buyer in a suspiciously nice suit wants to buy everything for 'employee appreciation gifts.'
notification_text: Corporate Bulk Buy! A corporate buyer placed a large order worth $%.0f!
toast_message: A corporate buyer just placed a massive bulk order!

name: Mega-Mart Madness
description: The big box store across the highway is running a doorbuster sale. Your customers are being poached.
notification_text: Mega-Mart Madness! A competitor's sale is pulling customers away. Demand drops 10%% for %d days.
resolution_text: Mega-Mart's sale ended. Customers are trickling back.
toast_message: Mega-Mart across the highway is running a massive sale! Demand is slipping.

name: Thunderstorm Warning
description: Dark clouds and sideways rain. The parking lot is a lake. Only the truly dedicated are braving the weather.
notification_text: Thunderstorm Warning! Heavy weather is reducing foot traffic by 30%% today.
resolution_text: The storm has passed. Shoppers are venturing out again.
toast_message: A thunderstorm is keeping shoppers away. Expect 30% less traffic.

name: Garage Sale Goldmine
description: Someone found a box of vintage items at a nearby estate sale and brought the best stuff straight to your back door.
notification_text: Garage Sale Goldmine! A rare %s has been added to your backroom inventory.
toast_message: A garage sale find! A rare item just showed up in your backroom.

name: Mall Health Inspection
description: The dreaded clipboard-wielding inspector is making the rounds. Keep things tidy or face consequences.
notification_text: Mall Inspection! An inspector is evaluating your store today.
toast_message: A mall inspector with a very long checklist is heading your way.

name: Price War Erupts
description: Two stores in the next wing started undercutting each other. Now everyone expects bargain prices.
notification_text: Price War! Nearby stores are slashing prices. Customer expectations are lower for %d days.
resolution_text: The price war burned itself out. Normal pricing expectations resume.
toast_message: A price war between nearby stores is dragging down customer spending.

name: Nostalgia Wave
description: A popular TV show just aired a retro-themed episode. Everyone's suddenly obsessed with the 90s again.
notification_text: Nostalgia Wave! A TV show triggered retro fever. %s demand surges for %d days!
resolution_text: The nostalgia wave has crested. Retro demand is settling down.
toast_message: A nostalgia wave is hitting! Retro items are suddenly hot again.
